RoutineCard.container: bg-surface dark:bg-surface border border-border dark:border-border rounded-2xl p-5 mb-4
RoutineCard.title: text-h3_card text-text_main dark:text-text_main

TaskItemRow.container: flex-row items-center justify-between py-3 border-b border-border dark:border-border last:border-b-0
TaskItemRow.checkbox_container: w-7 h-7 rounded-lg border-2 items-center justify-center

StreakIndicator.container: flex-row items-center gap-1.5 bg-success/10 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-full

PrimaryButton.container: w-full bg-primary py-4 rounded-full flex-row justify-center items-center active:opacity-80 mt-6

SecondaryButton.container: w-full bg-surface_elevated dark:bg-surface_elevated py-4 rounded-full flex-row justify-center items-center active:opacity-80 mt-3

ThemeToggle.container: flex-row items-center justify-between py-4 border-b border-border dark:border-border

LanguageSwitcher.container: flex-row items-center justify-between py-4 border-b border-border dark:border-border

animations_and_interactions.checkbox: Use a subtle spring scaling animation (e.g. React Native Reanimated) on check/uncheck. Must trigger Haptics.impactAsync('light').
animations_and_interactions.buttons: Active opacity set to 0.7 for standard touchables.
animations_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Use native stack standard transitions (slide-from-right on iOS, fade on Android).
animations_and_interactions.empty_state: Fade in smoothly when no routines exist.

images.google_logo_description: Use this URL or an equivalent local asset for the 'Login with Google' button icon.

instructions_to_main_agent: Environment: This is a React Native Expo app. Do NOT use web-only libraries like framer-motion, HTML tags, or tailwind web-only classes (like hover:). Use React Native primitives (View, Text, Pressable) with Nativewind or equivalent styling.
File Extensions: Use .js files as requested by the user.
Theming: Implement Dark Mode and Light Mode natively via React Native Appearance or Nativewind dark mode classes. Stick strictly to the defined hex codes for pure contrast.
Architecture: Create modular UI components (RoutineCard, TaskItemRow, StreakIndicator) and reuse them across TodayPage, RoutinesPage, etc.
Today View Focus: The TodayPage is the primary screen. It must be thumb-friendly. Ensure checkboxes are large enough (min 44x44px touch target) for easy tapping.
Testing: Add 'testID' attributes (the RN equivalent of data-testid) to all interactive elements, formatted as kebab-case, role-based (e.g., testID='login-submit-button').
Haptics: Integrate 'expo-haptics' and trigger light impact on task completion to make it motivating.
